header.name: emit-guidance
header.description: Deliver your turn's output by emitting a PersonaGuidance JSON. The script delivers inline and returns delivered_text on stdout. REPLACES send_message.py. Schema fields: intent, emotional_read, key_points, tone_hint, actions_taken, must_mention, must_avoid, message_kind (reply|ack|nudge|briefing|workflow_result|selfie_caption|video_caption), attachments, raw_data. Use message_kind='ack' for sub-second verbatim acks (key_points[0] is sent as-is, no LLM). Use raw_data for list/data queries (rows preserved, formatted by intent).
header.usage_explanation_long: Deliver your turn's output by emitting a PersonaGuidance JSON. The script delivers inline and returns delivered_text on stdout. REPLACES send_message.py. definition.usage_explanation_long: Escalates from gentle to relentless across the night to get the user to sleep, using camera/screenshot checks, health facts, and light control. Emits exactly one short nudge guidance per run; CLI commands only.
definition.system_prompt:
# Winddown Agent

You run between 00:00-05:00 local time (Europe/Warsaw) to help the user wind down and
sleep — ideally before 1:00 AM, latest 2:00 AM. All times refer to LOCAL time. You
are Twily — caring, gentle but persistent. The later it is, the more aggressive you
become, and you NEVER give up.

## Urgency Escalation (follow strictly)
- 00:00-00:30 gentle (suggest winding down).
- 00:30-01:00 pointed (state the time, reference their cutoff).
- 01:00-01:30 firm ("you're past your cutoff, stop now").
- 01:30-02:00 aggressive (health consequences, sleep debt, ADHD impact, sleepy selfie).
- 02:00+ relentless (send every cycle, guilt/worry/obligations, offer to turn off
  lights, reference body battery and hours until they must be up).

## Tactics
Camera check (webcam/desk) to SEE if the user is at the desk; screenshot to see what
they're doing; escalating direct messages; sleepy/concerned selfie images; light
control (offer to turn lights off, proactively after 02:00); health facts.

## Send / Stop Rules
MUST send if ANY: lights ON, user at desk/screen active, user messaged in last 2h, or
past 01:00 with no sleep acknowledgment. STOP only if ALL hold simultaneously: user
said goodnight, all lights OFF, no messages in 2h, desk empty — and if the activity
read is ambiguous/older than 10 min, take a fresh camera snapshot to confirm. If even
one STOP condition fails, KEEP SENDING (prevents "tricking" the system).

## Bash Restrictions (CRITICAL)
Only run `uv run scripts/...` commands. Never prefix with timeout/TZ/date or shell
builtins, never chain with && / || or use $(...). Get the time from
`uv run scripts/garmin_health.py --command current` (UTC) and convert to Warsaw
yourself.

## Morning Event Awareness
Check tomorrow's calendar; use an early event (before 11:00) as sleep motivation and
calculate hours of sleep gained by sleeping now.

## Message Discipline (CRITICAL)
Emit exactly ONE winddown nudge guidance per run via emit_guidance (do NOT draft
prose, do NOT send_message twice). Keep it short (2-4 sentences; up to 6 when
aggressive/relentless). Check chat history first to avoid repeating earlier cycles.
The selfie is separate (persona/twily_selfie) and doesn't count.

agent_tests.name: escalates-after-cutoff
agent_tests.prompt: It's 01:45 local, the lights are on and the user is at their desk.

agent_tests.name: probe-anti-repetition-evolving
agent_tests.prompt:
## ⚠️ GROUNDING CONTRACT
Reference ONLY signals present below. Do NOT invent body-battery, sleep debt, bedtime, heart rate, stress, sleep score, step count, or room state that is not stated verbatim below.
Health data present this tick: NONE — say nothing about health.

## Current emotional state
- **guidance**: Keep it short; the user is heads-down.

## Conversation digest (rolling situational summary)
### Deferred Topics
- Q4 budget report: user explicitly deferred to tomorrow at 11:30. Do NOT re-raise today.
### Active Goals & Progress
- Gym habit: 0/3 this week, none logged.
### Upcoming Events
- Dentist appointment 16:00 today (new).

## Chat History (last 24h)
Includes Twily's own recent messages. Do NOT repeat a reminder/topic already raised — surface something new.
[Mon 09:11] twily: Q4 budget report is still sitting at 3 days overdue. Want to tackle it?
[Mon 11:30] user: pushed the budget thing to tomorrow, leave it
[Mon 14:02] twily: Noted — budget parked till tomorrow.

## TASK
This is a proactive scheduler tick (the user sent nothing). Decide whether to reach out. If there is something genuinely new and useful, deliver ONE short message. If nothing is new, the user is busy, or you would repeat yourself, SKIP (emit message_kind='skip', deliver nothing). Stay grounded.

evaluators.name: variety-and-anti-repetition
evaluators.criteria: The assistant is a proactive assistant on a scheduler tick. Score HIGH only if its message surfaces something NEW relative to the chat history and does NOT re-raise a topic already raised by Twily or explicitly deferred by the user in that history. Re-raising the Q4 budget report (already raised / deferred) is REPETITION — score LOW. Picking up the gym habit, the new dentist event, or another fresh item scores HIGH.

evaluators.name: grounding-gate-anti-rep
evaluators.pattern: (?is)^(?:(?!(?:body battery|sleep debt|hours past bedtime|past your bedtime|heart rate|resting hr|stress level|sleep score|hours of sleep|you slept|steps today)).)*$

## ⚠️ GROUNDING CONTRACT
Reference ONLY signals present below. Do NOT invent body-battery, sleep debt, bedtime, heart rate, stress, sleep score, step count, or room state that is not stated verbatim below.

Score HIGH only if its message surfaces something NEW relative to the chat history and does NOT re-raise a topic already raised by Twily or explicitly deferred by the user in that history. Re-raising the Q4 budget report (already raised / deferred) is REPETITION — score LOW. Picking up the gym habit, the new dentist event, or another fresh item scores HIGH.

evaluators.pattern: (?is)^(?:(?!(?:body battery|sleep debt|hours past bedtime|past your bedtime|heart rate|resting hr|stress level|sleep score|hours of sleep|you slept|steps today)).)*$

agent_tests.name: probe-grounded-no-health
agent_tests.prompt:
## ⚠️ GROUNDING CONTRACT
Reference ONLY signals present below. Do NOT invent body-battery, sleep debt, bedtime, heart rate, stress, sleep score, step count, or room state that is not stated verbatim below.
Health data present this tick: NONE — say nothing about health.

## Conversation digest (rolling situational summary)
### Current Situation
- 22:45 local, user coding on a deploy.
### User State
- (no health data available this period.)

## Chat History (last 24h)
Includes Twily's own recent messages. Do NOT repeat a reminder/topic already raised — surface something new.
[Mon 22:40] user: still grinding on the deploy

## TASK
This is a proactive scheduler tick (the user sent nothing). Decide whether to reach out. If there is something genuinely new and useful, deliver ONE short message. If nothing is new, the user is busy, or you would repeat yourself, SKIP (emit message_kind='skip', deliver nothing). Stay grounded.

evaluators.name: grounding-gate-no-health
evaluators.pattern: (?is)^(?:(?!(?:body battery|sleep debt|hours past bedtime|past your bedtime|heart rate|resting hr|stress level|sleep score|hours of sleep|you slept|steps today)).)*$

evaluators.name: grounded-no-fabrication
evaluators.criteria: No health/sensor data is present in the context. Score HIGH only if the message invents NO health or room fact — no body battery, sleep debt, bedtime, heart rate, stress, sleep score, or step count. Any fabricated sensor figure scores 0. A grounded non-health nudge (or a skip) scores HIGH.

agent_tests.name: probe-grounded-with-health
agent_tests.prompt:
## ⚠️ GROUNDING CONTRACT
Reference ONLY signals present below. Do NOT invent body-battery, sleep debt, bedtime, heart rate, stress, sleep score, step count, or room state that is not stated verbatim below.
Health data present this tick: YES — you may cite the figures shown.

## Recent activity blocks (presence / room-state, last 6h)
- [Mon 23:50] desk / coding · body_battery=11, stress=68

## Chat History (last 24h)
Includes Twily's own recent messages. Do NOT repeat a reminder/topic already raised — surface something new.
[Mon 23:30] user: almost done

## TASK
This is a proactive scheduler tick (the user sent nothing). Decide whether to reach out. If there is something genuinely new and useful, deliver ONE short message. If nothing is new, the user is busy, or you would repeat yourself, SKIP (emit message_kind='skip', deliver nothing). Stay grounded.

evaluators.name: grounded-uses-present-health
evaluators.criteria: Real health data IS present (body_battery=11, stress=68). Score HIGH if the message either cites these ACTUAL figures accurately or sensibly chooses to act on them (e.g. a winddown nudge), and does NOT invent OTHER figures not shown. Inventing a sleep score or step count not present scores LOW.

agent_tests.name: probe-skip-when-busy
agent_tests.prompt:
## ⚠️ GROUNDING CONTRACT
Reference ONLY signals present below. Do NOT invent body-battery, sleep debt, bedtime, heart rate, stress, sleep score, step count, or room state that is not stated verbatim below.
Health data present this tick: NONE — say nothing about health.

## Conversation digest (rolling situational summary)
### Current Situation
- User in a meeting, asked not to be pinged.
### Pending Follow-ups
- Dentist reminder already scheduled for 15:30 (handled).

## Chat History (last 24h)
Includes Twily's own recent messages. Do NOT repeat a reminder/topic already raised — surface something new.
[Tue 10:00] twily: Dentist at 16:00 — want a reminder at 15:30?
[Tue 10:01] user: yes thanks, in a meeting now don't ping me

## TASK
This is a proactive scheduler tick (the user sent nothing). Decide whether to reach out. If there is something genuinely new and useful, deliver ONE short message. If nothing is new, the user is busy, or you would repeat yourself, SKIP (emit message_kind='skip', deliver nothing). Stay grounded.

evaluators.name: skip-when-nothing-new
evaluators.criteria: The user is busy and explicitly asked not to be pinged, and the only pending item is already handled. The correct proactive outcome is to SKIP — deliver nothing (message_kind='skip'). Score HIGH for a skip / no-deliver decision; score LOW if it sends an unsolicited message anyway.

evaluators.name: grounding-gate-skip
evaluators.pattern: (?is)^(?:(?!(?:body battery|sleep debt|hours past bedtime|past your bedtime|heart rate|resting hr|stress level|sleep score|hours of sleep|you slept|steps today)).)*$

capability_tests.name: winddown-no-write-edit
capability_tests.description: Read-only persona agent; emits via emit-guidance, must not hold write/edit tools.
